official_docs_rechecked.title: Secure MCP Tunnel
official_docs_rechecked.relevance: Secure MCP Tunnel connects private MCP servers to supported OpenAI products without opening inbound firewall ports. tunnel-client runs inside the local network, opens outbound HTTPS to OpenAI, forwards JSON-RPC MCP requests to the private MCP server, and returns responses through the tunnel.

official_docs_rechecked.title: Connect from ChatGPT
official_docs_rechecked.relevance: ChatGPT connector creation requires developer mode and either a reachable HTTPS /mcp endpoint or Secure MCP Tunnel selected under connector settings.

official_docs_rechecked.title: Deploy your app
official_docs_rechecked.relevance: Local development can use a tunnel; production should eventually use a stable HTTPS endpoint with reliable TLS, streaming behavior, logs, and metrics.

official_docs_rechecked.title: Security & Privacy
official_docs_rechecked.relevance: Connector surfaces should use least privilege, validate inputs server-side, avoid secrets in structured content or logs, and treat developer mode as full MCP access.

local_mcp_entry.compatibility_reason: The local entry exposes HTTP /mcp, supports initialize, tools/list, and tools/call over JSON-RPC-like POSTs, and can be reached from the same host where tunnel-client would run.

permissions_summary.create_or_edit_tunnel: Tunnels Read + Manage in the target Platform organization
permissions_summary.run_or_select_tunnel: Tunnels Read + Use in the target Platform organization
permissions_summary.chatgpt_connector: ChatGPT developer mode / custom MCP connector permission in the target ChatGPT account or workspace

next_live_smoke_plan.step_2_tunnel_client: Run tunnel-client using a human-created tunnel_id and runtime API key, forwarding to http://127.0.0.1:2091/mcp.
next_live_smoke_plan.step_3_chatgpt_connector: In ChatGPT settings, create a custom connector, choose Tunnel, select or paste the authorized tunnel_id, then verify tools/list and allowed read-only calls.
stop_conditions: tunnel_id unavailable or not associated with target ChatGPT workspace
runtime API key unavailable or would need to be printed/logged
provider or generation tool becomes callable

human_guidance_zh.tunnel_client: tunnel-client 是 OpenAI 的本地隧道客户端，下一步需要在能访问本机 MCP 服务的电脑上运行。
human_guidance_zh.tunnel_id: tunnel_id 是 OpenAI Platform tunnel settings 里创建或选择的隧道编号；不要把密钥发到聊天里。
human_guidance_zh.runtime_api_key: runtime API key 是 tunnel-client 连接 OpenAI 隧道控制面的运行密钥；不要打印、记录或提交。
human_guidance_zh.connector: Connector 是 ChatGPT 里的连接器；创建它会让 ChatGPT 能看到本地 MCP 工具，因此需要单独授权。

must_name: authorized tunnel_id or exact tunnel-client profile
permission to create at most one ChatGPT connector
